name: GMB Radar
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What GMB Radar Does

GMB Radar focuses on providing GeoGrid local ranking visualizations at an affordable price. Users enter a business location and set a grid radius; the tool displays ranking positions across different grid points and compares them against nearby competitors. White‑label reports and customizable scan schedules make it appealing for consultants or small agencies looking for a low‑cost entry into rank tracking.

Key Features

  • Easy-to-understand GeoGrid with customizable distance and size.
  • Easily schedule daily, weekly, or monthly scans to set your own cadence.
  • Easily conduct competitor monitoring within the same grid view.
  • Generate white-label local SEO reports with your own branding.

Benefits of GMB Radar

  • Helps you understand exactly where your client’s rankings drop off and how far competitors dominate.
  • The tool can scan unlimited locations across different campaigns.
  • Automated scheduled scans save time and provide regular performance overviews.
  • GMB Radar offers one of the lowest price points in the market.

Pricing

  • Standard: $15/month
  • Professional: $30/month 
  • Premium: $100/month 

This price includes unlimited locations and white‑label reports (from Professional upwards), making it attractive for solo consultants or small agencies.

Pros

  • Affordable pricing with transparent costs.
  • Customizable grids and scheduling options.
  • White‑label report downloads.

Cons

  • User interface feels dated compared with modern competitors and does not provide organic ranking or device‑level data. 
  • The user base is very small; GMB Radar has no published user insights on trusted review sites like G2 or GetApp.
